title: Increased Cooperation With U.S. Has Put Jordan in Iran’s Cross Hairs
summary_full: Jordan’s role in U.S. operations against Iran has grown as other allies in the region have restricted Washington’s ability to use their bases and airspace.
summary_public: Jordan’s role in U.S. operations against Iran has grown as other allies in the region have restricted Washington’s ability to use their bases and airspace.
